expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves component-stack constraints, embedding lifecycle assumptions, and integration-sensitive customer expectations
expectations.evidence: The output has an explicit section titled “Case focus coverage: context intake preserves…” and separately addresses “1) Component-stack constraints”, “2) Embedding lifecycle assumptions”, and “3) Integration-sensitive customer expectations”, including source-routing constraints and customer-scope evidence (CVS Pharmacy, Inc.).

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The output repeatedly frames the work as Phase 1 “context intake / spawn planning”, cites Phase 1 entry (`scripts/phase1.sh`), expected output (`phase1_spawn_manifest.json`), and `--post` validations, and states “This matches the benchmark’s required emphasis on context intake rather than drafting/review.”
